calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-16-2010 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-27-2010 Continued To Nov-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frederic Campagnoli for Sheriff Demetri.

Mr. Campagnoli stated that they were on course to having an agreement with Medicare within 60 days, asked for letters to be extended and stated that the petition will be dropped. The matter was continued to November 16, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The letters of Special Administration were also extended to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Continued To Jul-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Fred Campagnoli for Petitioner.

Mr. Campagnoli reported that they settled the action with the Hospital, that he sent the settlement statement to Medicare, that it would take about 45 days to get the final figure from Medicare, that the settlement is set up to pay their lien and asked for the Special Letters to be extended to July 27, 2010. The Court granted the extension of the Special Letters (order signed in open Court). The matter was continued to July 27, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Continued To Jun-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Fred Campagnoli for Petitioner.

The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to matter June 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to establish if there is a need for probate. The Letters of Special Administration were extended to June 8, 2010 Nunc Pro Tunc for Counsel to continue to obtain information from Medicare. The Court stated that Mr. Abelson filed a response to the Order to Show Cause, and that the Order to Show Cause was discharged and taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2010 Continued To May-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The matter was continued to May 5, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Attorney for failure to appear, for failure to file Proof of Publication and to show why surcharges/sanctions should not be imposed. The return date is May 5, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-06-2010 Continued To Apr-07-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frederci Campagnoli for Petitioner.

The matter was continued to April 7, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. An order extending the Letters of Administration to that same date was also signed in open court.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar Dec-11-2009 Granted Per Written Order
